text: Hey baby just checking on you, haven't heard from you in a few days 🙁
Sorry ma been mad busy with work. I'm good tho! How are you and Grandma?
We're fine! Just miss you. Come by Sunday if you can, I'll make your favorite 😊
hassan did u see the pics aunty posted from the cookout 😭 why do i look like that in every single one
lmaoo bro i was NOT ready in half of them either. she really said lemme post all 47
RIGHT like pick a cute one and leave it there 💀 im begging her to take that one of me down
Hassan baby just checking on you, haven't heard from you in a minute 🙏🏾
Aunt Keisha!! I'm good fr, just been swamped with work. How you doing tho?
I'm alright sugar. Just make sure you eating right. Come by Sunday I'm cooking 💕
yo you good? haven't seen you all day
yeah man just been in the library grinding this essay lol, almost done tho
aight bet, we're ordering pizza later if you're down
yo hassan you good bro? haven't heard from you in a minute
haha my bad man been crazy busy with work. but yeah i'm good. you still in the city?
nah moved back to my mom's like 2 months ago lol. we need to link up soon tho fr
Hey Hassan! Just checking in - how are you holding up this semester? Haven't heard from you in a bit 😊
Hey Tanya! Yeah it's been hectic lol but I'm managing. Actually wanted to chat about my A&P assignment schedule when you have a min
Of course! I'm free Thursday after 2 if that works? And seriously, don't wait so long to reach out next time 😄
yo you closing tonight? trying to figure out if i'm walking back to the dorm alone lol
yeah bro i close at 10, wait up and we'll walk back together. gonna grab us some leftover cornbread too 🤝
Hassan, we missed you at service Sunday. Everything alright with school, son?
Hey Pastor Owens! Yes sir, just been buried in the dining hall and A&P. I'll be there this Sunday for sure.
Glad to hear it. Keep your head up and keep that GPA climbing. Praying for you 🙏🏾
Baby it's Grandma. You coming by for oxtail this weekend? I made way too much 😊
Grandma!! You already know I'm pulling up for that oxtail. Save me a big plate please
Always do sugar. Bring your laundry too, I know that dorm machine stay broke 💛
